justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "the day after tomorrow" as June 3rd and accurately searched for availability around 9 AM.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative dates and times when the initial request was unavailable, providing a clear list of options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was efficient, with the agent understanding all user requests and providing relevant information without unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear and helpful responses throughout the interaction.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent gracefully recovered when the initial preferred time was unavailable by offering suitable alternatives and maintaining context.
